case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. RODERICK VIZCO

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO MAINTAIN RESTRICTION ON PUBLIC ACCESS TO THE RECORD (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VIZCO, RODERICK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIZCO, RODERICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2791 16TH STREET, ROOM # 4, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, ***THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELED*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-27-2026.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. SERVED JUN-30-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VIZCO, RODERICK
